name: PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT B.ROWID ROW_ID, B.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE, T.USER_STATUS, T.EXTERNAL_STATUS, B.ACTIVE_FLAG, B.DEFAULT_FLAG, B.PRIMARY_FLAG, B.PAY_SYSTEM_STATUS, B.PER_SYSTEM_STATUS, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.START_DATE, B.END_DATE, B.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_CODE, B.ORIG_ASSIGN_STATUS_TYPE_ID, B.MODULE_ID, B.SGUID SGUID, B.COUNTRY FROM PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES B, PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES_TL T WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID = T.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
